required_sections.description: Section titles every spec must carry, in order; empty sections render as explicit '(none)' rather than being dropped

story_format.description: Only the actor/feature/benefit form is defined; the field exists so a future form is explicit

allow_prototype_snippets.description: Whether prototype-validated, decision-rich snippets may be inlined (the only permitted code in a spec)

glossary_pack.description: Name of the domain-glossary pack instance whose vocabulary the spec must use; null if the project keeps no glossary
